channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Giuliana Rancic Opens Up About Her Career, Breast Cancer, and Staying Active
item.description: In a recent WebMD Real Stories Breast Cancer guide, Rancic, 51, discusses her red carpet career, breast cancer experience, and...

item.title: REBOA may not improve outcomes in non-traumatic out-of-hospital cardiac arrest
item.description: 1. Adding REBOA to advanced life support does not improve return of spontaneous circulation rates in non-traumatic cardiac arrest...

item.title: Ambient AI scribes reduce clinician documentation time by 16 minutes per encounter
item.description: A large study in JAMA (April 2026) found that ambient AI scribes cut clinician documentation time by 16 minutes per encounter...
